Even if it is a genuine filter, its performance will degrade if used for too long, resulting in water not being purified well. It is therefore important to replace with a genuine filter according to the replacement schedule. In addition, LG water purifiers use the ultrafiltration (UF) method, which means that minerals are left in the water. Due to the presence of minerals, when the water is heated or frozen, white precipitates may form. The first filter removes heavy metals and harmful compounds. It should be replaced every 6 months. The second filter removes some species of bacteria and fine particles. It should be replaced every 12 months.
